ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  BIL Vyapar Limited (formerly Binani Industries Limited) is formally undergoing a Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP), as confirmed by this regulatory filing regarding its fifteenth Committee of Creditors (CoC) meeting on July 3, 2026. The company being "under CIRP" is a critical red flag, signifying severe financial distress and a formal insolvency proceeding which poses a material risk of restructuring or liquidation for the company and its investors.
